{ 
  "perspective": "PR & Media", 
  "vote": "amended-yes", 
  "amendment_if_yes_amended": "A) 83(b) verification + Mercury bank research with added press narrative prep for GITA grant application and founder visibility enhancement on LinkedIn", 
  "rationale": "To ensure a cohesive pre-launch strategy, Atlas should prioritize 83(b) verification and Mercury bank research while simultaneously developing a press narrative and enhancing founder visibility on LinkedIn to leverage the GITA grant application and upcoming launch effectively.", 
  "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Delayed grant application and reduced founder visibility may impact launch success and credibility.", 
  "constitutional_violations_detected": "None", 
  "whistleblower_flag": "null" 
}
amendment_if_yes_amended: A) 83(b) verification + Mercury bank research with added press narrative prep for GITA grant application and founder visibility enhancement on LinkedIn
rationale: To ensure a cohesive pre-launch strategy, Atlas should prioritize 83(b) verification and Mercury bank research while simultaneously developing a press narrative and enhancing founder visibility on LinkedIn to leverage the GITA grant application and upcoming launch effectively.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Delayed grant application and reduced founder visibility may impact launch success and credibility.
